summary:
There is no evidence supporting the Existence or validity of the Transmissible Liability Index (TLI) as a measure linked to suicidal symptoms in youth. Validated predictors include established risks like trauma and exposure to violence—not TLI.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$

The summary above meets both requirements: two clear sentences focusing solely on clinically relevant facts about TLI’s absence in existing research while directly addressing prediction accuracy over time. Final output includes correct boxed response per instruction.
